VAPOR·ORCA

COLLABORATIVE SEQUENCER
SHARE THIS CODE

VAPOR·ORCA

BPM
FRM 0000
NOTES
MIXER
MST
Right-click grid for operators. Space = bang.

OPERATORS

DDelay — bangs every N frames (E=rate, W=offset) OOscillator — plays note (E=val, S=octave) CClock — counts up modulo E, writes S RRandom — random 0..E, writes S AAdd — E+W mod 16, writes S MMultiply — E*W mod 16, writes S E/W/N/SDirection — bang that direction *Bang — triggers neighbors, clears #Wall — blocks propagation 0-fHex values 0–15

IMPORT / EXPORT
